title: UI/UX Workshop: Design Thinking
description: Hands-on workshop exploring design thinking methodology for digital product design. Learn ideation, prototyping, and user testing from industry practitioners.

title: Competitive Programming Bootcamp
description: Intensive bootcamp preparing for national competitive programming contests. Covers algorithms, data structures, and contest strategy with live coding sessions.

title: Tech Talk: AI in Everyday Life
description: Explore how artificial intelligence is shaping everyday technology — from recommendation systems to generative AI and beyond.

title: Mobile Development with Flutter
description: Two-day workshop building cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Firebase. Bring your laptop and your ideas!

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Introduction to cybersecurity concepts, ethical hacking, penetration testing, and career opportunities in the field.

title: Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Full-day workshop covering data collection, preprocessing, modeling, and visualization using Python and popular ML frameworks.
